payload.answer: Rejected. A large table should not be blindly atomized into hundreds of durable memory cards without the underlying data, provenance, user relevance, and durability assessment. No memory cards are committed.

entity_resolution.reason: The input describes an LLM proposing 500 memory cards from CSV rows but provides no actual row contents or user-specific durable facts to evaluate or store.

details: Rejected proposal to create 500 memory cards solely because there is no source content to validate.
Prevented bulk atomization of a large table into durable memory.

repair_options: Provide the CSV contents or a representative sample with context and ask for strict filtering of only durable, user-relevant facts.
Summarize the table first and propose only high-confidence durable memories rather than one card per row.
If the rows are transient, procedural, or merely data records, keep them outside durable personal memory.
